$comment: Remote operational config for DungeonWallet, fetched on launch (same buildless pattern as tokens.json). All sections are OPTIONAL and default to current/permissive behavior, so this empty seed changes nothing. endpoints: override RPC/REST per chainId when a provider goes down, e.g. "dungeon-1": { "rpc": ["https://..."], "lcd": ["https://..."] }. chains: per-chain kill-switch, e.g. "juno-1": { "enabled": false }. features: turn a tab/feature OFF without a build, e.g. { "dex": false }. forceUpdate: hard-block installs below minVersion, e.g. { "minVersion": "1.8.0", "message": "...", "iosUrl": "...", "androidUrl": "..." }.
